chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُغَسِّلُ الْمَرْأَةَ وَ الْمَرْأَةِ تُغَسِّلُ الرَّجُلَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 29 – The man washes the woman, and the woman washes the man

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/336)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/336)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمَرْأَةِ إِذَا مَاتَتْ فَقَالَ يُدْخِلُ زَوْجُهَا يَدَهُ تَحْتَ قَمِيصِهَا إِلَى الْمَرَافِقِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Al Husayn Bin Usman, from Sama’at who said,
‘I asked about the woman when she dies. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Her husband would insert his hand under her shirt up to the elbows’.
en.sarwar: 6. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from al-Husayn ibn ‘Uthman from Sama‘ah who has said the following: “I once asked him (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a woman who dies. He (the Imam) said, ‘Her husband can reach out with his hand under her shirt up to the elbows.’”
